## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] All existing tests still pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] New behaviour has test coverage (or explain why not)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or tokens committed
- [ ] CORS / auth / rate-limit behaviour unchanged (or intentionally updated)
- [ ] `requirements.txt` updated if new deps added
- [ ] README updated if public interface changed
